name: Textured Horizontal Stripe Matelassé Shower Curtain Cream - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Cotton Fabric, Buttonhole Top
description:
Bring elegant style to your bathroom with this Textured Horizontal Stripe Matelassé Shower Curtain from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Designed in a solid cream hue, it features a matelassé weave for a textured look, while horizontal stripes lend a sleek look to it. Made from 100% cotton for a soft feel, this decorative shower curtain features a buttonhole top for easy installation, and you can toss it in the washing machine for a quick refresh when needed.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
